channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
item.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

item.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
item.description: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, June 13 (game #1098)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, June 13 (game #1601)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, June 13 (game #832)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quote of the day by inventor of the World Wide Web, Tim Berners-Lee: "Data is a precious thing and will last longer than the systems themselves" — highlighting the longevity of data as a resource
item.description: One of the most esteemed scientists in the world reflects on how important data has become in the 21st century and the modern iteration of the internet

item.title: I've spent over 30 hours customizing my ship, recruiting crew members, collecting bounties, and combating aliens in Starfield on PS5, and I've still barely scratched the surface of Bethesda's sci-fi RPG
item.description: Bethesda's spacefaring RPG finally has its definitive version on PlayStation 5.

item.title: Kimi K2.7-Code cuts thinking tokens 30% — but practitioners say the benchmarks don't check out
item.description: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7-Code this week, an open-source update to its K2 coding model family, claiming leaner reasoning and double-digit performance gains.K2.7-Code is built on the same trillion-parameter mixture-of-experts architecture as its predecessor K2.6, and drops in via an OpenAI-compatible API — which matters for teams already running K2.6 in production gateways.When K2.6 launched in April, it topped OpenRouter's weekly LLM leaderboard — a ranking based on actual API routing decisions by developers, not self-reported benchmark scores.Moonshot AI says K2.7-Code addresses what it ...
